name: Banana Nut Chocolate Chip Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream butter and sugar until smooth.
3. Add egg and mashed banana, mixing well.
4. Stir together flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, nuts, and chocolate chips.
5. Alternately add the dry mixture and buttermilk to the creamed mixture, stirring just until combined.
6. Pour batter into a greased and floured loaf pan (9x5x3 inches).
7. Bake for 65 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow bread to cool in the pan for about 5 minutes before turning it out onto a wire rack.
